name: Content Terminate Branch Policy Pipeline
description: Parallel content-branch workflow with authored terminate_branch semantics.
outcome: One branch can be terminated without terminating its sibling branch.

definition.process_instructions: The workflow drafts multiple campaign branches in parallel. The brand assessor evaluates each branch independently. A rejected branch MUST terminate only the authored branch identified by its branch_key while sibling branches continue.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: variant-draft
stages.goal: Each branch draft is assessed independently.

checkpoints.name: variant-draft
checkpoints.goal: Each branch draft is assessed independently.
checkpoints.entry_criteria: The branch work item is created.
